title: rhinanthus alpinus subvar. elatus
intro: Rhinanthus alpinus subvar. elatus is a subvariety of the Rhinanthus alpinus plant, a type of flowering plant in the broomrape family, characterized by its unique ability to obtain nutrients from surrounding plants. Traditionally, Rhinanthus alpinus subvar. elatus has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Rhinanthus alpinus subvar. elatus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
